title: cepa angulosa
intro: Cepa angulosa, also known as the Angle Onion or Wild Onion, is a species of plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family, characterized by its narrow, linear leaves and a bulbous base. Traditionally, Cepa angulosa has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high sulfur content. The health benefits of Cepa angulosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Cepa angulosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or infusion, often blended with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects, and is considered a natural remedy for various ailments.
